title: Intuit (INTU) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Intuit (INTU) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.47 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.98 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.66 per share a year ago.

title: Intuit 1Q results top estimates; stock higher
text: Intuit Inc after Tuesday's close announced first quarter fiscal 2024 adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $2.47, surpassing the analyst consensus forecast of $1.98.  The global financial technology platform's revenue for the period, meanwhile, rose 15% year over year to $3.0 billion, also exceeding Wall Street expectations of $2.88 billion.

title: TurboTax Maker Intuit Tops Quarterly Estimates But Misses With Outlook
text: Financial software firm Intuit beat Wall Street's targets for its fiscal Q1 but missed estimates for the current quarter.

title: Intuit's stock is on the rise after revenue. earnings beats
text: Intuit Inc.'s INTU stock inched up nearly 1% in extended trading Tuesday after the software company reported quarterly results that topped analyst revenue and earnings estimates. Intuit reported fiscal first-quarter net income of $241 million, or 85 cents a share, compared with net income of $40 million, or 14 cents a share, in the year-ago quarter.
